About BrightPath

Building science guidance with a neighborly tone.

BrightPath helps homeowners understand what their house needs, why it needs it, and what order makes sense.

Local service standards

Respectful visits

We move carefully through the home and explain what we are seeing.

Readable notes

Homeowners get plain-language findings with practical next steps.

Low pressure

The goal is clarity first so the family can decide what comes next.

What happens during a visit

  1. We learn about comfort complaints, bill concerns, and project goals.
  2. We inspect the home systems and look for leakage, insulation, and control issues.
  3. We review the findings and explain which upgrades should happen first.
BrightPath Home Energy

Home energy assessments, comfort upgrades, and practical electrification planning.
